author: Rive Animator
title: Hiring Freelance Character Illustrators
content: We’re looking for freelance Character Illustrators and Character Designers for remote, project-based work. Help us turn AI-assisted character concepts into clean, high-quality final artwork. Send your portfolio, rates, and availability to: uiuxanimation@gmail.com #Hiring #CharacterDesigner #Illustrator #FreelanceJobs
